enonce.texte: Match the following formal expressions with their correct meanings or translations.

questions.texte: Match each expression with its correct meaning.

sousQuestions.texte: "I am writing to apply"
"I am interested in"
"I believe I am a suitable candidate"
sousQuestions.reponse: Je crois que je suis un candidat approprié

sousQuestions.texte: "I look forward to hearing from you"
"Yours faithfully"
sousQuestions.reponse: Veuillez agréer, Monsieur/Madame, l'expression de mes salutations distinguées (formule de politesse)

enonce.texte: A formal letter of application follows a specific structure. Identify the correct order of the following parts.

questions.texte: Put the following parts of a formal letter in the correct order.

sousQuestions.texte: The writer's address and date
The recipient's address
The body of the letter (introduction, skills, experience, conclusion)
The salutation (e.g., Dear Sir/Madam)
The closing (e.g., Yours faithfully) and signature

intitule: Grammar: Appropriate Tenses in Formal Letters

enonce.texte: Complete the following sentences from a cover letter with the correct tense or structure.

questions.texte: Fill in the blanks with the correct tense of the verbs in brackets.

sousQuestions.texte: I _______________ (write) to apply for the position of Marketing Assistant.
I _______________ (work) as an intern at a local company for six months.
During my internship, I _______________ (develop) strong communication skills.
I _______________ (be) confident that I can contribute to your team.
I _______________ (look) forward to discussing my application with you.

enonce.texte:
Read the following formal letter of application and answer the questions below.

Letter of Application

123 Main Street
Yaoundé, Cameroon
15th June 2025

The Human Resources Manager
ABC Company
P.O. Box 456
Douala, Cameroon

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to apply for the position of Sales Representative, which I saw advertised on your company website. I am very interested in this opportunity because I believe my skills and experience make me a suitable candidate for this role.

I have recently completed my Baccalaureat with a specialization in Economics. During my studies, I developed strong communication and problem-solving skills. Furthermore, I have worked as a volunteer at a local NGO, where I gained valuable experience in customer service and teamwork.

I have always been passionate about business and sales. I am confident that my motivation, adaptability, and ability to work under pressure would be an asset to your company.

I have attached my CV for your consideration. I look forward to hearing from you and would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application in an interview.

Yours faithfully,

Jean-Paul Nguema

questions.texte: Analyze the letter of application and answer the following questions.

sousQuestions.texte: What position is the applicant applying for?
What qualifications does the applicant have?
sousQuestions.reponse: The applicant has a Baccalaureat with a specialization in Economics.

sousQuestions.texte: What experience does the applicant mention?
sousQuestions.reponse: The applicant worked as a volunteer at a local NGO, gaining experience in customer service and teamwork.

sousQuestions.texte: What personal qualities does the applicant highlight?
sousQuestions.reponse: The applicant highlights motivation, adaptability, and the ability to work under pressure.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the closing of the letter?

enonce.texte:
Situation: You are a student in Terminale. You saw the following job advertisement online and you want to apply.

Job Advertisement

Position: Junior Administrative Assistant

Company: Cameroon Business Solutions

Location: Yaoundé

Requirements:

  • Good communication skills in English and French.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
  • Ability to work in a team.
  • Strong organizational and time management skills.

Send your application letter and CV to hr@cbsolutions.cm

questions.texte: Write a formal letter of application (200-250 words) to apply for this position.
questions.reponse: Students should write a letter that includes: the writer's address and date, the recipient's address, a formal salutation (Dear Sir/Madam), a clear introduction stating the position applied for, a body highlighting skills and qualifications, a conclusion expressing interest in an interview, a formal closing (Yours faithfully), and a signature.

enonce.texte: Read the following sentences and identify which ones are formal and which are informal.

sousQuestions.texte: "I'm writing to apply for the job."
"I am writing to apply for the position of Sales Assistant."
"I've got lots of experience."
"I have acquired significant experience through my work experience."
"I look forward to hearing from you."

enonce.texte:
Context: You find the following job advertisement in a local newspaper.

Job Advertisement

Company: Green Energy Cameroon

Position: Community Outreach Officer

Responsibilities:

  • Organize community events to raise awareness about renewable energy.
  • Communicate with local communities and stakeholders.
  • Prepare reports and presentations.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree (or in final year of studies).
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to work independently and in a team.
  • Knowledge of environmental issues is an advantage.

Send your application letter and CV to hr@greenenergy.cm by the end of the month.

questions.texte: Write a formal letter of application (200-250 words) for this position.
questions.reponse: Students should write a formal letter that includes: the writer's address and date, the recipient's address, a formal salutation (Dear Sir/Madam), a clear introduction stating the position applied for, a body highlighting relevant skills (communication, interpersonal skills, knowledge of environmental issues), experience (if any), and motivation, a conclusion expressing interest in an interview, a formal closing (Yours faithfully), and a signature.

enonce.texte:
Complete the following sentences from a cover letter with the appropriate words from the box.

Word Box: apply, position, qualifications, experience, skills, candidate, opportunity, interview

questions.texte: Fill in the blanks with the correct words from the box.

sousQuestions.texte: I am writing to _______________ for the _______________ of Marketing Officer.
I believe my _______________ and _______________ make me a suitable _______________ for this role.
I am looking forward to the _______________ of discussing my application in an _______________.

enonce.texte:
Context: You are a student in Terminale and you want to apply for an internship at a local company. You have the following information about the company and the internship.

Internship Opportunity

Company: Yaoundé Digital Solutions

Position: Intern in Digital Marketing

Duration: 3 months

Tasks:

  • Assist in managing social media accounts.
  • Create content for the company website and social media.
  • Help organize digital campaigns.

Requirements:

  • Good knowledge of social media platforms.
  • Good writing skills in English and French.
  • Ability to work in a team.
  • Creative and motivated.

questions.texte: Write a formal letter of application for this internship. Include all the necessary parts of a formal letter.
questions.reponse: Students should write a formal letter that includes: writer's address and date, recipient's address, formal salutation, clear introduction stating the position applied for, body highlighting relevant skills (knowledge of social media, writing skills, teamwork), experience (if any), motivation, conclusion expressing interest in an interview, formal closing (Yours faithfully), and signature.
